mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM winyo_mentions
category = #{filterCategory}
AND (
category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR category = CASE WHEN #{searchWord} LIKE '%승률%' THEN 'WIN_RATE' WHEN #{searchWord} LIKE '%횟수%' THEN 'ATTENDANCE_COUNT' WHEN #{searchWord} LIKE '%흐름%' THEN 'RECENT_TREND' ELSE #{searchWord} END
level_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
message LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR level_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR message LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
)
ORDER BY category ASC, min_val ASC, priority DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE winyo_mentions SET level_name = #{levelName}, message = #{message}, min_val = #{minVal}, max_val = #{maxVal}, priority = #{priority}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE mention_id = #{mentionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM winyo_mentions WHERE category = #{category} AND condition_code = #{conditionCode} ORDER BY priority DESC LIMIT 1
